principles: Dashboard zeigt Tageslage aus data/YYYY-MM-DD/findings.json, nicht nur Run-Delta.
Emergency RSS writer ist Fallback, nicht Lagebild.
Einzelne Quellenfehler begrenzen Coverage, brechen aber nicht den Feed.

medium.title: Funded: AI is having its moment, climate is having a crisis. SEA can’t afford to confuse the two
medium.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
medium.summary: I’ve lived across Southeast Asia long enough to know what the heat feels like in five different cities. Jakarta. Ho Chi Minh City. Singapore. Kuala Lumpur. Manila. They all feel different. But they’re all on the same clock. I’m not a climate scientist. I’m not a fund manager with a climate mandate. I’m someone who […] The post Funded: AI is having its moment, climate is having a crisis. SEA can’t afford to confuse t…
medium.relevance_reason: AI/KI (+3.8); APAC Trend Radar (+3.0); Public Health (+5.0); Southeast Asia (+2.0); recent (+1.0); watchgraph region southeast_asia: Singapore (+2.0)
medium.recommended_action: Beobachten, Quelle sichern und bei Wiederholung erneut bewerten.

observe.title: What building an AI food intelligence app taught us about Southeast Asia’s nutrition problem
observe.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
observe.summary: When my wife Pauline and I started building Naturegrade, we weren’t trying to launch a startup. We were trying to solve a problem that had frustrated us for years. observe.title: Why PMs should shadow customer support weekly
observe.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
observe.summary: Inside most companies, the product is discussed in its intended form. Teams talk about the workflow, the value proposition, the release objective, the target persona, and the outcome the feature is meant to unlock. All of that is necessary, but it creates a dangerous habit. Product leaders start relating to the product through design intent […] The post Why PMs should shadow customer support weekly appeared first on…
